title: The Adjudicator Special Report: Tools of the Trade
content:
{{Top|rwm|old}}
'''The Adjudicator Special Report: Tools of the Trade''' was the edition of ''[[The Adjudicator]]'' that was included with [[Knights of the Old Republic 20|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 20]].

==Appearances==

*[[Zax]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]
*[[Krav Noblis]]

}}
